title: Anim´s Bar
description: A new GUI for your Minecraft Gameplay! This GUI is compatible with Appleskin and FarmersDelight
body:
<details>
- <summary>READ BEFORE DOWNLOAD</summary>The Recourse Pack is not getting updated till now! If u want Updates, then install Anim´s Pack found on my Profile
</details>

<details>
- <summary>Early Access 🔒</summary>

### Early Access available on Discord ↓

[![Alt Text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2334cf3eb4b13ee2695bae533f8044f6237efd83.png)](https://discord.gg/hjVXth7Cyy)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Introducing 📖</summary>

- Whole Bar retextured
- Everything colored Golden
- clean Pixels
- no Graphical Bugs etc.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Features ➕</summary>

- Golden Hearts as the Health bar
- Golden Carrots as the Hunger bar
- Full set of heart states (normal, hardcore, poison, wither, absorption, freeze)
- Golden XP Bar in Enchantment Style
- Clean pixels & no blur
- transparent backgrounds
- Golden HotBar Selector
- Golden HotBar

</details>



<details>
<summary>Compatibility 💻</summary>

- Compatible with Minecraft 1.6.1–1.21.x
- Also works as a pure resource pack that means no mods required


</details>


<details>
<summary>How to Install? 🧭</summary>

1. Put the zip into resourcepacks.
2. Move it to the top of the list.
3. Enjoy the Pack :>

</details>


<details>
<summary>Permissions 🔑</summary>
  
- No reuploads/reposts of the pack files.
- Only private Edits; ask for permission to redistribute.

</details>



<details>
<summary>Credits 💞</summary>

- hunger bar designed by wil
- XP Bar inspired by Sharpness 500K tp

</details>
  
<details>
<summary>Future Updates</summary>

- no more updates incoming
  
</details>

__________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________

[![Alt Text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b578eb51364cdee9b3ba1b750f0f8cceb1adebc.png)](https://discord.gg/hjVXth7Cyy) [![Alt Text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/OaWx51mi/9d96a2f73e00d2118c5cb06668e09e54139c5f51_96.webp)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/garrot-hunger-bar)
